productDisplayName: Disney Kids Girl's White Dress Pooh Kidswear
description: Composition:100% cotton white Daisy dress with tie up sleevesWashcare:Machine wash in cold water with a gentle cycle using mild detergent. Wash dark colours seperately. Do not bleach. Do not soak nor wring. Dry it inside out. Do not tumble dry. Do not iron on print and studs.Fitting:Comfort FitThis white dress from disney with tie ups, ruffle hem and a baby Daisy will surely bring a smile on your little princess' face. Team this with her favourite shoes and she's set for a fun day.
